basic_details.job_title: HPRCA Teachers Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 808 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Himachal Pradesh Rajya Chayan Aayog (HPRCA), Hamirpur
basic_details.post_name: Teachers (Music, Drawing, Sanskrit, Physical Education, History, Hindi, Geography)
basic_details.department: Himachal Pradesh Rajya Chayan Aayog (State Selection Commission)
basic_details.short_information: HPRCA Recruitment 2026: Get the latest HPRCA recruitment notification 2026 for 808 Teachers vacancies under the Himachal Pradesh Rajya Chayan Aayog (HPRCA). The online application process starts on 17th April 2026 and the last date to apply online is 15th May 2026. Find HPRCA vacancies for Music Teacher, Drawing Teacher, Sanskrit Teacher, Physical Education Teacher, History Teacher, Hindi Teacher, and Geography Teacher on the official website hprca.hp.gov.in. You can also get Free Job Alert of "Upcoming HPRCA Teachers Recruitment 2026" notifications for freshers and experienced candidates. Als

important_dates.computer based test (cbt) date: To be notified later on HPRCA website

application_fee.details: Candidates applying for the posts are required to pay a non-refundable application fee. The fee must be paid online only through Credit Card, Debit Card, or Net Banking. Fee once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances.

age_limit.age_relaxation: As applicable as per Himachal Pradesh Government rules
age_limit.details: Candidates must be between 18 and 45 years of age as on 01-01-2026. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per Himachal Pradesh government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Option-1: +2 (50%) + 2-year D.P.Ed; Option-2: B.P.Ed (50%) or Graduation + Physical Education elective (50%); Ex-servicemen option; Additional 5% relaxation for sports participants
qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the last date of application submission (15-05-2026). The educational qualification must be from a recognized University established under Central Act, Provincial Act, State Act or an Institution recognized by the UGC. TET qualification is mandatory for most teaching positions. Proficiency in Hindi and English is required for all posts. | Post-Wise Educational Qualification | General Qualification Requirements: | B.Ed (≥50% marks) from recognized university TET (Teacher Eligibility Test) qualified Proficiency in Hindi and English language 5% marks relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PwD candidates of Himachal Pradesh

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 30,000/- per month (payable for 10 months in an academic year)
salary_details.details: The selected candidates will receive a fixed honorarium/consolidated amount under the CBSE Affiliation Scheme. The payment is made for 10 months in an academic year. This is not a government position and no regularization claims are applicable.

selection_process: S. No. Test Component No. of Questions Maximum Marks Duration
1 Subject(s)/Field(s) up to the level of prescribed essential qualification 120 120 90 Minutes (1½ hours)
2 General Knowledge (including GK of HP), Current Affairs, Everyday Science, Logical Reasoning, Social Science, General English & General Hindi (Matric Standard)

The selection process for HPRCA Teachers Recruitment 2026 consists of Computer Based Test (CBT) or Written Screening Test followed by Document Verification and Merit-based selection. Candidates who secure more than the prescribed minimum qualifying marks will be ranked in descending order on the basis of aggregate marks obtained in the CBT under their respective category.
Note: Each question carries 1 mark. Detailed syllabus may be released on the official website. For candidates appearing in multiple shifts
scores will be normalized using Z-Score Method (Mean and Standard Deviation Method) for merit list preparation.
Candidates can select their preferred exam district. However
HPRCA reserves the right to allot any examination centre within Himachal Pradesh.

Shortlisting for Document Verification based on merit Final selection/allocation based on "Merit-Cum-Option-Cum-Availability of Post" formula Category-wise waiting list/panel prepared (25%/15%/10% of posts as per rules) Recommendations valid till appointments are offered by the Appointing Authority Selected candidates liable to be posted anywhere within Himachal Pradesh State
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the HPRCA official portal accessible via the official website https://hprca.hp.gov.in. No offline application will be accepted. The online portal is active from 17-04-2026 (10:00 AM) to 15-05-2026 (11:59 PM). Candidates must complete One-Time Registration (OTR) before applying for the post.
Steps to Apply Online:
Step 1: Sign Up - Register on the HPRCA portal by clicking "Sign Up" to create username and password

Step 2: One-Time Registration (OTR) - Complete OTR with personal information, educational qualifications, work experience (if any), upload recent photograph & signature, and upload relevant supporting documents
Step 3: Complete/Update Profile - Only users with completed profile can apply. Edit profile if required
Step 4: Apply for a Post - View available posts and click "Apply"
Step 5: Preferred Exam District - Select preferred district(s) for examination (HPRCA reserves the right to allot any centre)
Step 6: Confirm Application Details - System auto-fills details from profile; review carefully before submission
Step 7: Pay Application Fee - Pay through Online Payment Gateway (Credit Card/Debit Card/Net Banking)
Step 8: Application Submission Confirmation - After successful payment, application is complete. Download confirmation page
Documents to be Uploaded at the Time of Online Application:
Recent passport size photograph (as per specifications)
Signature (scanned image)
Relevant educational qualification certificates
Supporting documents as required
Documents to be Produced at the Time of Document Verification (on being called):
Valid Call Letter and Photo Identity Proof (Aadhaar Card / PAN Card / Passport / Driving License / Voter ID / Bank Passbook with photograph / Employee ID etc.)
Educational qualification certificates and mark sheets (10th, 12th, Graduation, Post Graduation, B.Ed, etc.)
TET qualification certificate
Category certificate (SC/ST/OBC/EWS) as applicable (valid on closing date and date of document verification)
BPL/EWS certificate (if applicable)
PwBD/PwD certificate (if applicable)
Wards of Freedom Fighters certificate (if applicable)
Domicile certificate of Himachal Pradesh
Downloaded Online Registration Application (ORA) form
Apply Online at: https://hprca.hp.gov.in
important_instructions: Date for determining eligibility is the closing date i.e. 15-05-2026 (11:59 PM) Age reckoned as on 01-01-2026 Category certificates (OBC, BPL/EWS, WFF etc.) must be valid on both closing date and date of document verification Reserved category candidates of other States will be treated as General (UR) category Only one application per post is allowed. Multiple applications are liable to rejection Candidates must be registered on One Time Registration (OTR) portal before filling Online Registration Application (ORA) Correction window available for 4 days after closing date with correction fee of Rs. 100/- Keep mobile number and email ID active till completion of selection process PwBD/PwD candidates can avail scribe/reader + compensatory time (20 minutes per hour) after prior approval Examination and processing fee once paid is non-refundable Provisional admission to CBT; final eligibility determined at document verification Admit Card downloadable from website only (no postal dispatch) Candidates must bring downloaded ORA form + original certificates at document verification No change in category claimed after correction window Meritorious reserved candidates considered only in their reserved category (not in unreserved category) Waiting list valid for one year from date of recommendation Selected teachers engaged purely on Scheme basis – temporary (5 years), fixed honorarium only, not Government employees, no regularization claim, service rules not applicable Any dispute subject to Court jurisdiction of Himachal Pradesh HPRCA reserves right to change terms, rectify errors, club posts, cancel recruitment, etc. Candidates are advised to visit https://hprca.hp.gov.in regularly for updates regarding examination date, admit card, results, and other notifications

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies in HPRCA Teachers Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Ans: A total of 808 Teacher vacancies have been announced under HPRCA Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the online application dates for HPRCA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Ans: The online application starts on 17 April 2026 (10:00 AM) and closes on 15 May 2026 (11:59 PM).

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for HPRCA Teachers 2026?
faq.answer: Ans: All candidates have to pay a combined Examination Fee and Processing Fee of ₹800, while the correction fee during the correction window is ₹100.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for HPRCA Teachers Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Ans: Candidates must be between 18 and 45 years of age as on 01 January 2026, with age relaxation applicable as per rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification for Music Teacher under HPRCA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Ans: Music Teachers must have MA (Vocal/Instrumental) with at least 50% marks, B.Ed with 50%, be TET qualified, and possess proficiency in Hindi and English.

faq.question: Q6. What is the required qualification for Teacher (Sanskrit), Hindi, History and Geography?
faq.answer: Ans: Candidates need MA in the relevant subject with minimum 50% marks, B.Ed with 50%, TET qualification, and proficiency in Hindi and English, with 5% marks relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PwD of Himachal Pradesh.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are there for each subject in HPRCA Teachers Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Ans: There are 118 posts each for Music Teacher, Drawing Teacher, Sanskrit Teacher and Physical Education Teacher (Elementary), 151 for Teacher (Hindi), 99 for Teacher (Geography) and 86 for Teacher (History).

faq.question: Q8. Where can candidates apply online for HPRCA Teachers Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Ans: Eligible candidates can apply online through the official Himachal Pradesh Rajya Chayan Aayog website at hprca.hp.gov.in within the specified dates.
